At nearly 3 meters, with that wind, today's Baleal Norte is best observed from the cafe.
🌊 Swell: 2.9m @ 16s 💨 Wind: 9.0km/h ESE (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 14.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: 🌊 2.9m @ 16s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.7m @ 15s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
At nearly 3 meters with offshore wind, Ribeira d'Ilhas will be rideable, assuming you enjoy a vigorous paddling workout.
🌊 Swell: 2.7m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 22.0km/h SE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 46.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind • Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: 🌊 2.6m @ 15s CROSS
programme.desc:
